feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Goods issue with wrong unit cost.
entry.content:
Due to wrong foreign exchange rate, my items in the warehouse were posted by wrong item cost. i.e. the item cost escalated by 1000's.  However, the quantity in either GI or GR are correct. Due to this issue, there has been a significant impact on my GL. 

The issues related to Foreign Currency exchange were corrected, however, I am now stuck on how to correct the values of the GR and GI with wrong unit cost need to be corrected. 

I am not sure if I should be going for inventory revaluation or making the reversal entries wherever possible. But the major concern is that the quantity of goods issue or goods receipt is correct.

 

Thank you everyone in advance. #SAPB1

entry.title: SAP B1 SQL Dashboard User name and password not working
entry.content:
Dear all,

When I am trying to login to generate the Dashboard SAP Business SQL then it is not working.

It's showing error like Incorrect Username and Password.

SAP Business One SQL Version,  Dashboard 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Can we edit user defined objects with ui configuration?
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we edit user defined objects with ui configuration? I have too many fields and they look too cluttered. The add and cancel buttons are too low to be visible. How can I edit them?

Can you help me? Thank you, regards.

entry.title: Requirement for Data Encryption & Decryption in SAP BOM
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We have a specific requirement and would appreciate your suggestions on how to implement data encryption and decryption.
The customer needs to restrict access to BOM (Bill of Materials) details, ensuring that these details are not visible to every user. For users without the necessary permissions, the data should be displayed in an encrypted format (e.g., "******").
Head Office (HO) users will have full access to create BOMs, while the factory team will only have access to create Production Orders. Is there any provision in standard SAP to mask certain fields (e.g., with "***") for users without credentials?

We would appreciate any guidance or recommendations on how to achieve this.

entry.title: Web Client-when tried open SQ encounter error 'permission group is not defined [GroupAlwaysEditable
entry.content:
SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.141) FP 2011 HOTFIX1 (64-bit), Singapore localization DB.

Using manager ID (superuser), when tried to open the created Sales Quotation, it shows error message 'permission group is not defined [GroupAlwaysEditable]'.

The same user ID, when I tried to 'Create Sales Quotation', it doesn't open the entry at all, it just show blank page.

I have attached the print screens for your reference. 

Any idea how to fix the issues? Or it is system bug?

error when tried open created SQ.

when click on 'Create Sales Quotation', it doesn't open the entry, instead showing this blank page.

entry.title: Create delivery from salesorder in SAP B1 service layer API for partial DocumentAdditionalExpenses
entry.content:
Hi,
 
I am creating a delivery from a sales order using the SAP B1 service layer API, incorporating partial line-item details as well as partial DocumentLineAdditionalExpenses and DocumentAdditionalExpenses in the initial delivery note by retrieving data from the sales order get API.
 
However, when attempting to create a second delivery note using the remaining line items along with the pending DocumentLineAdditionalExpenses and DocumentAdditionalExpenses, I am unable to retrieve the utilized expenses from the sales order.
 
Could you please suggest a method to verify the utilized expense details from the sales order using SAP B1 service layer?

entry.title: How to create BOM and Production order for 3 branches in SAP Business One(SAP B1)
entry.content:
I have 3 branches in all the 3 branches(A,B,C) we'll create finished and semi finished goods,
Branch - A- FG001

Branch - A- FG001 To make this FG001 we need 5 semi finished goods these semi finished goods are creating in different branches like 2 will create in Branch - B and 2 will be in Branch - C and Branch - A will be in 1 semi finished goods. 
now i'm getting confused how to create BOM and Production Order for this scenario 
please someone guide me with this it'll be so helpful for me

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: Assistance Required with Exchange Rate Differences in Goods Receipt
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Request your assistance in sorting the issue below.
When a good receipt is made, the amount is posted in the exchange rate differences.

Please help on the calculation of amount.

entry.title: Data migration from SAP B1 to S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently planning on the Data Migration project to migrate data from SAP Business One(B1) to S4HANA public cloud.

In the below link Migration options between SAP B1 and S4HANA Public Cloud 

@Yong_Yu  mentioned "you can use S/4 Migration Cockpit to migrate legacy data from B1 HANA table to S/4 directly". I have the following questions regarding this statement.

  1. Does the above statement mean to use the Migration cockpit(Fiori App ID: F3473) to download the corresponding master/transaction data Templates, fill the templates and then upload these templates to the cockpit, to complete the migration process ? or any other alternative suggested here ?
  2. If using data templates, I would like to know, whether there are any alternatives available to automate the data transfer from SAP B1 to these templates or are these templates supposed to be filled done manually ?

Thank you!

Regards,
Karthik

entry.title: Planned quantity is lower than issued quantity
entry.content:
In B1 10, FP2105HF1 I'm trying to updat an existing workorder through the ServiceLayer.

We already issues 18 pieces of one component and the planned qty is 18. When I update the WO through the servicelayer to lower the planned qty to 9 I receive this error:

Planned quantity is lower than issued quantity [ProductionOrderLines.PlannedQuantity][line: 3]

But I don't want to change the issues qty of line 3, it can stay like that. I'm also keeping the plannenqty on line level at 18. How can I change the plannedqty on the header to 9?

 

This is my Json:

{
"AbsoluteEntry": 3094,
"DocumentNumber": 241723094,
"Series": 27,
"ItemNo": "PARC -13",
"ProductionOrderStatus": "boposReleased",
"ProductionOrderType": "bopotStandard",
"PlannedQuantity": 9,
"JournalRemarks": "Production Order - PARC -13",
"ProductDescription": "PARC13",
"Priority": 100,
"ProductionOrderLines": [
{
"DocumentAbsoluteEntry": 3094,
"LineNumber": 0,
"ItemNo": "W-PARC -13",
"BaseQuantity": 1.5,
"PlannedQuantity": 18,
"IssuedQuantity": 0,
"ProductionOrderIssueType": "im_Backflush",
"Warehouse": "04",
"VisualOrder": 0,
"ItemType": "pit_Item",
"AdditionalQuantity": 0,
"StartDate": "2024-07-03",
"EndDate": "2024-07-23",
"RequiredDays": 0
},
{
"DocumentAbsoluteEntry": 3094,
"LineNumber": 1,
"ItemNo": "UF 0054 40/10 PANA",
"BaseQuantity": 0.05,
"PlannedQuantity": 0.6,
"IssuedQuantity": 0,
"ProductionOrderIssueType": "im_Manual",
"Warehouse": "MAT PANA",
"VisualOrder": 1,
"ItemType": "pit_Item",
"AdditionalQuantity": 0,
"StartDate": "2024-07-03",
"EndDate": "2024-07-23",
"RequiredDays": 0
},
{
"DocumentAbsoluteEntry": 3094,
"LineNumber": 2,
"ItemNo": "C-PARC -13",
"BaseQuantity": 1.5,
"PlannedQuantity": 18,
"IssuedQuantity": 18,
"ProductionOrderIssueType": "im_Manual",
"Warehouse": "03",
"VisualOrder": 2,
"ItemType": "pit_Item",
"AdditionalQuantity": 0,
"StartDate": "2024-07-03",
"EndDate": "2024-07-23",
"RequiredDays": 0
},
{
"DocumentAbsoluteEntry": 3094,
"LineNumber": 3,
"ItemNo": "D-250F-UF-0054",
"BaseQuantity": 1.5,
"PlannedQuantity": 18,
"IssuedQuantity": 0,
"ProductionOrderIssueType": "im_Backflush",
"Warehouse": "03",
"VisualOrder": 3,
"ItemType": "pit_Item",
"AdditionalQuantity": 0,
"StartDate": "2024-07-03",
"EndDate": "2024-07-23",
"RequiredDays": 0
},
{
"DocumentAbsoluteEntry": 3094,
"LineNumber": 4,
"ItemNo": "E-250-UF-0054",
"BaseQuantity": 1.5,
"PlannedQuantity": 18,
"IssuedQuantity": 0,
"ProductionOrderIssueType": "im_Backflush",
"Warehouse": "03",
"VisualOrder": 4,
"ItemType": "pit_Item",
"AdditionalQuantity": 0,
"StartDate": "2024-07-03",
"EndDate": "2024-07-23",
"RequiredDays": 0
}
]
}

entry.title: SAP B1 Company Database not Displaying on the SLD
entry.content:
Hi

We are currently experiencing an issue with our SAP B1 MySQL company database. Suddenly, we lost access to our SAP server, and after restarting it, we noticed that the database is no longer displayed in the System Landscape Directory (SLD). Additionally, we are unable to connect to the database.

We would greatly appreciate your assistance in resolving this matter as soon as possible.

entry.title: Update fields in sap b1 query generator (update command)
entry.content:
Hello

I used UPDATE query in query generator for sap business one to change items (oitm) validFor and frozenFor fields. Update query worked good but then I couldn't add item for oitm (items). How to fix it? 

 

I have written 
UPDATE OITM T0

SET T0."ValidFor" = 'Y', T0."frozenFor" = 'N'

entry.title: Query manager yellow arrow for docnum from QIPF
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a query on Query Manager, to pull DocNum from QIPF (Landed Costs).
Somehow the Yellow Arrow, when clicked always pointed to the document in the year 2017. 

So far I haven't encountered this issue for DocNum on Sales Orders or other documents.                  

 

 

 





Any clues or advice?

SAP Business One

entry.title: AUTO height details section
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using Crystal Reports to make a Sales Quotation layout.

In the DETAILS section, i have the lines of the sales quotation.

In the REPORT FOOTER section, i have subtotals, VAT, discounts...

The porblem is with the number of items per page.

I have a quotation with 57 lines.

In the report, i get HEADER, 57 lines and PAGE FOOTER in the first page, and the second page has HEADER, FOOTERS and a big blank space between both, since there are no more lines to print.

I can change the height of DETAILS saction manually, but i will get the same problem with a 40 lines sales quotation, for example.

What i want to do is make a variable field / section height depending on the number of lines.
Is it possible?

Thanks.

Victor

entry.title: i need to update the tax code for all or multiple line items without doing so manually
entry.content: In SAP Business One, if ihave a purchase order with many items and i need to update the tax code for all or multiple line items without doing so manually for each line or using Excel

entry.title: INSTALLATION CRYSTAL REPORT
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have already installed sap crystal report in my PC client after I reinstalled the crystal, I completed all the installation steps and it shows that "the installation is complete" but if I want to run the program it is not displayed anywhere in the desktop and even if in the control panel;

Any ideas?

Regards

SAP Crystal Reports SAP Business One

entry.title: SAP window frozen after lock windows
entry.content:
Hi,

Tthe SAP B1 client frozens after windows lock screen.

It doesn't even responds by clicking or right clicking on the windows task bar.

The PC uses windows 10 and SAP B1 is HANA 10 2208.

It happens with different users SAP was already removed and reinstalled.

Any ideia how to solve this ?

Thanks,
Paulo

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Invoice by ship-to
entry.content:
SAP Business One (version 10)

I have a business partner with multiple ship-to addresses. Each ship-to has it's own email address for invoicing. Is it possible to configure the BP so each invoice can go to different email addresses defined by the ship-to location?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error while generating E-Invoice
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

The customer has issued a Tax Invoice with the Bill To/Ship To Address ID as "S D CORPORATION," but in the BP Master, the Address ID is recorded as "SD CORPORATION."

Upon reviewing the BP Master change log, we did not find any irrelevant entries related to the Address ID. Could you please advise what might be the reason for this discrepancy, and how we can check if the user updated the details from the backend?

According to the BP Master log, the Address ID was updated from "S D CORPORATION" to "SD CORPORATION" at 18:34:33 on 20/09/24, while the invoice was created earlier, at 15:09:13 on the same day.

Your guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Edit Crystal Report Designer in SAP Business One Client computer
entry.content:
Hi All

How to install this Crystal Report Designer on a client computer to click directly in SAP Business One Report Layout Manager Edit button? 

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong
